message:
test(diagram): add 33 unit tests for diagram.rs coverage (bd-3sfzm)

Adds comprehensive tests for previously uncovered functions:
- is_horizontal_fill, is_vertical_border, is_junction, is_border_char
- find_diagram_blocks edge cases (empty, no diagrams, blank continuation/termination, confidence)
- correct_diagram edge cases (empty, no diagrams, CJK, idempotency, zero iterations, multiple blocks)
- detect_vertical_border/detect_suffix_border edge cases
- LineKind::is_boxy, classify_line variants
- visual_width edge cases, zero-width codepoints

Total: 54 diagram tests (21 existing + 33 new)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
